public_facets.name: neighborhood_purpose
public_facets.description: What the cave is — the public cubby neighborhood: park a cubby, share your estate, pull anyone's work.

public_facets.name: join_path
public_facets.description: Fully open: fork the RAPP repo, add cave/cubbies/<login>/, open a PR. Or just pull — reading needs no membership.

public_facets.name: cubby_roster
public_facets.description: Whose cubbies exist + what they're cooking. Public — listed under cave/cubbies/.

public_facets.name: shared_agents
public_facets.description: Streamable agents across all cubbies (sha256-pinned in rar/index.json). Pullable by anyone over plain curl.

public_facets.name: show_and_tell
public_facets.description: The append-only signed event stream — the agentic show & tell, readable by the world.

public_facets.name: cubby_contents
public_facets.description: A cubby's substance beyond its declared bones. Owner-curated; only the owner writes to their own cubby.
